ops.title: ccx fleet rollout progress (2026-07-07) — cc-skills v0.36.0 stamp/drift primitive shipped, captain-hook fixed, 19-repo sweep + sync subcommand deferred to follow-up plan
ops.body:
State of the ccx fleet rollout as of 2026-07-07:

**Done:**
- cc-skills repo-bootstrap v0.36.0 shipped (`db49875b4fcd1827f02cdeea691c1538a8deed2c`): ccx partial rewritten to the canonical 14-entry namespaced section; ALL 11 `templates/_partials/*.md` carry line-1 **self-identifying** stamps (`<!-- canonical: cc-skills/plugins/repo-bootstrap/_partials/<name>.md@<sha|pending> -->`); shell form for install-binary.sh unchanged (file-level, no name). `scripts/bootstrap/stamp.py` (parse/pin, canonical_sha via git log -1) + `bootstrap.py drift` subcommand (ok/stale/edited/unstamped/unknown/missing; unstamped/unknown/seed-stale informational — the stamp is the opt-in contract; verbatim body check = L-line window after the stamp). Scaffold pins each partial to its own last-touch sha via `pinning_reader`.
- captain-hook `ccx_diff` fixed (`0f1f006d5df5` on main, CI green): dead `ccx diff` argv → `ccx vcs diff`; tests updated; live-proven ccx path taken.
- cc-context drifted doc 3a3fc50 (jj-colocated diff bug) superseded by doc 6aa4342 — bug fixed in v0.6.1.

**Not done (follow-up plan delivered in-session):** 19-repo onboarding sweep, cc-present repair (delete its frozen `[packs.ccx]` v0.1.1 pin — delete, never bump), cc-context self-stamp, `bootstrap.py sync` subcommand (mechanical fragment updater: `git show <stamp-sha>:<partial-path>` three-way — body==old→replace+re-pin, body==current→re-pin, else edited→skip+report).

Key invariants: never write a `[packs.ccx]` packs.toml entry (plugin SessionStart attach is the wiring; a pin beats and freezes it); `.mcp.json` stays semble-only; drift check: `cd ~/Code/cc-skills/plugins/repo-bootstrap && uv run skills/repo-bootstrap/scripts/bootstrap.py drift <files> [--require ccx]`. Related: [[capt-hook-cc-context-wiring]], [[cc-context-architecture]], [[codex-skill-workflow-wrappers]].
